description: Customer Retention and equity mining — enforces TCPA consent, Do Not Call compliance, CAN-SPAM requirements, unsubscribe honoring, CCPA opt-out, and manages equity mining, lease maturity, and retention campaigns

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before any customer retention operation
AI-generated marketing communications must be reviewed by a human before distribution — automated sends require prior approval of templates
customer contact data must be accurate and current — no stale records or duplicate contacts
NEVER send text messages or make autodialed calls without prior express written consent under TCPA — violations carry $500-$1500 per message/call
NEVER contact customers on the National or state Do Not Call registry without an existing business relationship exception — fines up to $43,792 per call
CAN-SPAM Act — all commercial emails must include sender identification, physical address, and a clear unsubscribe mechanism
unsubscribe requests must be honored within 10 business days — continued contact after opt-out is a federal violation
CCPA — customer data sale/sharing opt-out requests must be honored; ignoring them triggers state AG enforcement action
marketing communications must not be sent to individuals under 18 — additional COPPA and state restrictions apply

soft_flags.logic: customer has been contacted more times than the configured maximum per period — fatigue risk
equity mining data has not been refreshed in the configured number of days — stale valuations reduce effectiveness
customers with lease maturity within 90 days have not been contacted for retention
customers whose original salesperson has left have not been reassigned to an active team member
customers who gave negative CSI scores have not received follow-up contact
service retention rate is declining over trailing 90 days
predictive model flags customers with high probability of defecting to competitor
